name: ai-assistant
description: WhatsApp AI assistant powered by Claude, using Meta Cloud API

scripts.build:mcp: npm run build:mcp:google && npm run build:mcp:resend
scripts.build:mcp:resend: esbuild node_modules/resend-mcp/dist/index.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/resend-mcp-server.bundle.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
